parameters.content: WP ne sait pas lire les Services au format texte

parameters.query:
SELECT
    v.submission_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN v.key = 'name' THEN v.value END) AS name,
    MAX(CASE WHEN v.key = 'service' THEN v.value END) AS service,
    MAX(CASE WHEN v.key = 'message' THEN v.value END) AS message,
    MAX(CASE WHEN v.key = 'field_cd2aae5' THEN v.value END) AS Titre,
    MAX(CASE WHEN v.key = 'field_a70b45a' THEN v.value END) AS fichier,
    MAX(CASE WHEN v.key = 'categorie' THEN v.value END) AS Categorie,
    MAX(CASE WHEN v.key = 'field_c3233c5' THEN v.value END) AS skip_ai,
    s.user_ip, -- AJOUT DE L'IP ICI
    s.created_at
FROM 
    wp_e_submissions_values AS v
JOIN 
    wp_e_submissions AS s ON v.submission_id = s.id
WHERE 
    s.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE
    AND s.post_id IS NULL -- FILTRE ANTI-DOUBLON (uniquement si pas encore lié)
GROUP BY 
    v.submission_id, s.created_at, s.user_ip
ORDER BY 
    s.created_at DESC;
